instruction: Write an HTML5 definition list with three term-definition pairs explaining API concepts: Endpoint, Payload, and Rate limit.
code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <title>API glossary</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <dl>
      <dt>Endpoint</dt>
      <dd>A URL path that accepts HTTP requests for a specific resource.</dd>
      <dt>Payload</dt>
      <dd>The request or response body sent between client and server.</dd>
      <dt>Rate limit</dt>
      <dd>The maximum number of requests allowed within a time window.</dd>
    </dl>
  </body>
</html>
